name: prepared-for-the-worst-selected-essays-and-minority-reports
description: Christopher Hitchens' essays on politics, literature, religion, and culture — showcasing the polemical style and contrarian brilliance of one of the 20th century's greatest public intellectuals.
useCase: Understand the art of polemical writing, political and literary criticism, and the role of the public intellectual through Hitchens' essays.
knownRisks: Essay collection — not a single argument but many
Hitchens' strong opinions may be controversial
